summary: iOS 🟥 ANC | Settings for Transparency mode are not properly applied/saved
scenario: Transparency Mode sub-setting (Environment/Speech) reverts to default when switching between sub-settings on Voyager Surround 85, Free 60, and Free 20
description_clean: Settings for Transparency mode (Environment and Speech sub-settings) are not properly applied or saved. When the user sets Transparency to Environment, closes settings, then reopens and sets it to Speech (or vice versa), the setting reverts to a default instead of saving the selected option. On Surround 85 it always reverts to Speech; on Free 60 and Free 20 it always reverts to Environment.
